metadata.file_name: Daryl Hall & John Oates - Out of Touch (Avangart Tabldot Remix).flac
metadata.title: Out of Touch (Avangart Tabldot Remix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:18.42] Shake it up is all that we know
[00:22.02] Using the bodies up as we go
[00:26.29] I'm waking up to fantasy
[00:29.78] The shades all around, we used to see
[00:33.75] Broken ice still melts in the sun
[00:37.45] And ties that are broken can often be one again
[00:42.11] We're soul alone, and soul really matters to me
[00:47.66] Take a look around
[00:50.40] Reaching out for something to hold
[00:53.99] Looking for a love where the climate is cold
[00:58.37] Manic moves and drowsy dreams
[01:01.58] Or living in the middle between the two extremes
[01:06.34] Smoking guns, hot to the touch
[01:09.79] Would cool down if we didn't use 'em so much, yeah
[01:14.22] We're soul alone, and soul really matters to me
[01:19.55] Too much
[01:22.02] 
[02:42.47] You're out of touch, I'm out of time
[02:46.41] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[02:50.45] You're out of touch, I'm out of time
[02:54.36] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[02:58.33] You're out of touch, I'm out of time
[03:02.59] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[03:06.44] You're out of touch, I'm out of time
[03:10.49] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[03:14.32] You're out of touch, I'm out of time
[03:18.35] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[03:22.38] You're out of touch, I'm out of time
[03:26.56] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[03:30.25] 
[03:45.83] Out of touch, out of time (oh-oh-oh)
[03:47.93] Out of touch, out of time, girl (oh-oh-oh)
[03:53.98] Out of touch, out of time (oh-oh-oh)
[03:56.06] Out of touch, out of time, girl (oh-oh-oh)
[03:59.25]
